cypher: MERGE (n:Entity {uuid: $uuid}) ON CREATE SET n.name = $name, n.group_id = $group_id, n.labels = $labels, n.created_at = timestamp($created_at), n.name_embedding = $name_embedding, n.summary = $summary, n.attributes = $attributes

MERGE (n:Entity {uuid: $uuid}) ON CREATE SET n.name = $name, n.group_id = $group_id, n.labels = $labels, n.created_at = timestamp($created_at), n.name_embedding = $name_embedding, n.summary = $summary, n.attributes = $attributes

MERGE (n:Episodic {uuid: $uuid}) ON CREATE SET n.name = $name, n.group_id = $group_id, n.created_at = timestamp($created_at), n.source = $source, n.source_description = $source_description, n.content = $content, n.content_embedding = $content_embedding, n.valid_at = timestamp($valid_at), n.entity_edges = $entity_edges
